cap.reality_value.health.tip.low: [!]You are sick. Please quickly restore your health using items like herbs and bandages.
cap.reality_value.sanity.tip.low: [!]You are on the verge of a mental breakdown, please restore your sanity through activities such as fishing and flower picking as soon as possible
cap.reality_value.sanity.low.1: §8[§4!§8] §4Why! Why does this happen to me
tooltip.reality_value.herb: 15% chance to drop from breaking grass. Right-click to use, restores 2 HP and 0-1 wellness.
tooltip.reality_value.bandage: Crafted from herbs and tattered cloth. Right-click to use, restores 4 HP and 1-3 wellness.
tooltip.reality_value.tattered_cloth: Right-click to use, restores 2-4 HP without restoring wellness.
tooltip.reality_value.antibiotics: 1% chance to drop from breaking moss blocks. Right-click to use, restores 8 HP and 4-7 wellness.
tooltip.reality_value.rum:
Right-click to eat, restores 6-14 sanity and 3-6 thirst.
§8§oDo not imitate in real life
tooltip.reality_value.first_aid_injectio: Right-click to use, fully restores HP and recovers 10 wellness.
